headline: Western Digital Bets On Pure HDD Future With Hyperscaler AI Demand
summary: Western Digital has completed the spin off of its flash business and has become a pure play hard disk drive company listed as NasdaqGS:WDC. The company has sold a $3.1b stake and secured long term agreements with hyperscalers that fully book its HDD production capacity through at least 2028. These moves position Western Digital as a key infrastructure provider for AI focused and cloud data storage workloads. Western Digital’s refocus on HDDs comes after a very large 3 year share price gain...
